# Teamed Country Guides

> Employer of Record + payroll + compliance content for hiring across 100+ countries. Teamed is the global EOR you keep, on a single fixed rate ($599/£479 flat, Zero FX). Teamed-owned legal entities in 23+ countries with a vetted partner network elsewhere. Content is researcher-grade: statutory rates, worked examples, schema-marked, kept current to 2026.

This live index is a sample. The full set of 62 country / US-state guides exists in the source repo and ships to teamed.global as the Next.js cluster grows. The six pages below are the currently-deployed examples on this Vercel staging while we manage bandwidth.

## United Kingdom

- [Hiring in the UK | Employer of Record + 2026 Guide](/united-kingdom/): Hire UK employees from £479/month via Teamed Ltd, our wholly-owned London entity. 15% NIC, 5.6 weeks statutory leave, 6 April 2026 day-one rights.
- [UK Employer Cost Breakdown 2026 | What a £60k Hire Really Costs](/united-kingdom/cost-breakdown/): A £60,000 UK hire costs £72,000–£75,000 loaded. Full line-by-line breakdown of NIC, pension auto-enrolment, statutory leave, Apprenticeship Levy, and Class 1A/1B NIC for 2026.

## Germany

- [Germany Tax and Payroll 2026 | Sozialversicherung, Lohnsteuer](/germany/tax-and-payroll/): German payroll 2026: ~20.7% employer social security, BBG €5,812.50 / €8,450, four income tax zones to 45%, €13.90 minimum wage, monthly Lohnsteueranmeldung.

## United States

- [California State Income Tax and Unemployment Insurance 2026 | Teamed](/united-states/california/state-income-tax-and-unemployment-insurance/): California payroll 2026: progressive 1.0–12.3% income tax with 1% MHSS surcharge over $1M (13.3% effective top), 1.3% uncapped SDI, $7,000 UI wage base.
- [California Wage, Overtime and Meal-Break Law 2026 | Teamed](/united-states/california/wage-overtime-and-meal-break-law/): California wage law 2026: $16.50/hr state minimum, daily overtime over 8 hrs, 2x double-time over 12, premium pay for missed meals, PAGA exposure.

## Contractors

- [Hiring Contractors in the United States 2026 | 1099 vs W-2 | Teamed](/hire-contractors/united-states/): 1099 vs W-2 classification 2026: IRS common-law test, ABC states, California AB5, Section 530, why EOR doesn't cure misclassification.

## Source + governance

- Source repo: `teamed-country-guides` (Vercel staging `teamed-country-guides.vercel.app`)
- Full 62-page bundle available on request for Webflow / Next.js migration.
- Editorial standard: `editorial-standard-v2.md` (2026-05-27).
- Updated: 2026-05-27.
